scripts.bootstrap: npm run up:detached && npm run migrate
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.quality:check: npm --prefix roundcoach-api run lint && npm --prefix roundcoach-api test && npm --prefix roundcoach-api run build && npm --prefix roundcoach-worker run lint && npm --prefix roundcoach-worker run build && npm --prefix roundcoach-web run lint && npm --prefix roundcoach-web run build
